description: Festival-aware Indian quick-commerce price intelligence with two decision surfaces

week1.title: Frontier APIs, scraping, prompting, markdown, JSON

groq_chat.desc: Groq chat completion for runtime LLM calls
groq_chat.demo: Predictor tab: any query routes through Groq

tavily_scrape.demo: Enable web evidence toggle in ensemble.py scout()

markdown_briefs.desc: LLM markdown signal brief of a page

prompt_engineering.demo: Verifier judge uses system prompt guardrails

strict_json.demo: All agent arms output strict JSON

blinkit_scrape.demo: BL-* catalog entries from live Blinkit

week2.title: Multi-model APIs, Gradio, chat, tools, multimodal

model_router.demo: Router picks model tier per task (summarize vs pricing vs strong)

gradio_cockpit.desc: Gradio app with Predictor, Substitute, Translate, Analytics tabs
gradio_cockpit.demo: Launch app: Predictor tab shows 5-arm comparison

vision.demo: Substitute tab: upload product image for analysis

multimodal_gen.demo: Generate deal card SVG offline; TTS via HF inference

week3.title: HuggingFace pipelines, tokenizers, open models, audio/image

hf_pipelines.desc: Zero-shot signals, Hinglish aspect-sentiment, brand NER
hf_pipelines.demo: Classify evidence signals via zero-shot HF pipeline

sentiment.desc: Sentiment and aspect-sentiment analysis over Hinglish reviews
sentiment.demo: Run sentiment/aspect analysis on Hinglish review snippets

embeddings.demo: Chroma vector store uses ST embeddings for retrieval

week4.title: LLM-driven code generation, parser benchmarks, unit-normalization

parser_candidates.desc: Deterministic + Groq-synthesised product-listing parsers benchmarked against gold
parser_candidates.demo: Score each parser candidate against gold listings

unit_norm_kernel.desc: Python + Mojo-like unit-normalization kernel timed head-to-head
unit_norm_kernel.demo: Normalize INR prices across kg/g/l/ml/piece with timing

groq_codegen.demo: Set RUN_LIVE_CODEGEN=1 to use Groq; otherwise the benchmark uses a deterministic fallback

week5.title: RAG with LangChain, Chroma, hybrid retrieval, reranking

chroma_store.desc: Chroma vector store over KB markdown + catalog
chroma_store.demo: Build index, retrieve chunks for pricing questions

hybrid_rerank.demo: retrieve() blends vector similarity + lexical overlap

query_rewrite.desc: LLM query rewriting for sparse queries
query_rewrite.demo: Colloquial Hinglish queries rewritten to keyword-rich search

grounded_rag.demo: Predictor tab: RAG context panel shows retrieved sources

rag_evals.desc: RAG evaluation: retrieval recall and MRR
rag_evals.demo: Eval harness scores retrieval quality against golden questions

week6.title: Data curation, feature engineering, classical ML baselines, experiment tracking

curated_data.desc: Curated Indian commerce data: real Blinkit + synthetic SF-*
curated_data.demo: 146 BL-* real + 25 SF-* synthetic SKUs with price history

unit_norm_features.demo: Compare unit prices across pack sizes and platforms

meta_learner.desc: RandomForest + linear stacking meta-learner with train/test split
meta_learner.demo: Train MAE 105 INR vs test MAE 390 INR on held-out 20%

experiment_track.demo: All training runs logged with metrics, config, artifacts

week7.title: LoRA/PEFT fine-tuning, HF Hub publishing, QLoRA runbook

lora_classifier.desc: LoRA/PEFT fine-tune bert-tiny on Hinglish commerce labels
lora_classifier.demo: Train locally in seconds; logs macro-F1 per epoch

lora_price_regression.desc: LoRA price regression on distilbert-base (Colab notebook)
lora_price_regression.demo: Colab: train {product, festival, platform} -> INR price

hf_hub_publish.desc: Adapter + dataset publish to Hugging Face Hub
hf_hub_publish.demo: Push LoRA adapter and signal dataset to HF Hub

qlora_runbook.demo: Bash commands for 4-bit QLoRA on GPU

week8.title: Agentic spine, decision surfaces, safety, deployment

agent_spine.desc: Agentic spine: scout -> classify -> verify -> route -> decide -> remember
agent_spine.demo: Single run() call executes full pipeline

typed_briefs.desc: Pydantic-typed Brief with two decision variants

meta_ensemble.desc: Trained meta-learner ensemble blends classical + LLM arms
meta_ensemble.demo: 5-arm comparison: RF, LoRA, Claude, Groq+RAG, ensemble arbitrator

memory.demo: Analytics tab shows memory stats by intent

safety.desc: Prompt injection resistance via verifier agent

deploy.desc: Gradio deploy (local + HF Spaces + Modal runbook)
deploy.demo: Launch on :7860; deploy to HF Spaces or Modal
